Buffs.buffList: Herald of Thunder, Innervate, Precision, Wind Dancer

PathOfBuilding2.Notes:
Summary: 1. Same starting location as the Amazon I played in 0.2 2. Same offensive, double the hit defence, same speed, potentially worse top-end recovery but better DoT mitigation
0.3 Patch notes: The Called Shots Notable Passive Skill no longer lets you apply an additional Mark. Instead it causes your projectiles to chain to marked enemies, and grants the new Called Shots Meta Skill that repeatedly marks enemies near you, bypassing your Mark limit. The Eagle Eyes Notable Passive Skill no longer removes the distance-based accuracy penalty. Instead, it applies 20 stacks of Critical Weakness to enemies when you consume a Mark on them.
Buffs: Reloading a crossbow and switching crossbow ammunition no longer reduces the player's movement speed Shock duration buff x2 (23.2sec shock dura) Multiple copies of same gem means martial tempo, lightning attunement, primal armaments shared Reduced attribute requirements Players now gain +6 to Accuracy Rating per Level (previously +3), and each point of Dexterity now grants +6 to Accuracy Rating (previously +5) Swapping weapons is now instant (for stormcaller / blink)
Nerfs: Exposure halved on unique enemies: 24% --> 12% Blink weapon swap not available (we have sprint now) Shockburst Rounds: Pulse Explosion Attack Damage has been lowered by approximately 15%. Galvanic Shards: Ammunition no longer has 50% less Reload Speed, and now has 1 Bolt loaded per clip (previously 5).
Summary of Mechanic Combo used: Automark ascendency + crit weakness + tailwind Interaction: Called shot Meta Skill apply sniper's mark on trigger Crit monster to consume sniper's mark to apply 20 stacks of critical weakness on monster (+10 base crit in config) Gain frenzy charge (charge infusion for 12% skill speed)
Clear: Galvanic shards + HoT
Single target: Storm caller arrow + Shockburst rounds
Additional damage uncalc-ed 1. sniper's mark 2. charge infusion? 3. conductivity/elemental weakness 4. lightning exposure/strip away 5. emergency reload 6. culling on marked enemy
Other potential ideas: 1. find a way to generate endu/power charge will benefit charge infusion spirit gem - early on redflare conduit for power charges for early crit (before uberlab) 2. new updated passive tree makes the tree alot denser 3. deflection investment (weights on gear, points to invest/accessibility on tree) 4. abyss bone modifiers 5. additional socket / qual on gear 6. in the ultra endgame, drop maligaros with a near mirror tier xbow with crit hit chance/dmg and scale crit multi should give a higher top end 7. against the darkness jewel
Things to ponder: 1. mark effect weapon set 2 for voltaic single target self cast could be stronger
Levelling Options: 1. LA + Lightning Rod + Freezing Salvo 2. Icy Tip + some cold bow clear skill + Freezing Salvo + Snipe (maybe)

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Against the Darkness Time-Lost Diamond Item Level: 82 Radius: Large Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 Notable Passive Skills in Radius also grant 4% increased Dexterity Notable Passive Skills in Radius also grant 4% increased Intelligence

Rarity: UNIQUE Controlled Metamorphosis Diamond Item Level: 84 Radius: Variable Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 Only affects Passives in Large Ring Passives in Radius can be Allocated without being connected to your tree -12% to all Elemental Resistances -10% to Chaos Resistance

Rarity: RARE Chimeric Joy Emerald Item Level: 27 Implicits: 0 8% increased Projectile Damage 8% increased Damage with Crossbows 3% increased Attack Speed with Crossbows 14% increased Duration of Ignite, Shock and Chill on Enemies Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Oblivion Spark Emerald Item Level: 74 Implicits: 1 {enchant}+10 to Intelligence 14% increased Lightning Damage 18% increased Evasion Rating 4% increased Attack Speed with Crossbows Mark Skills have 24% increased Skill Effect Duration Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Loath Wisdom Sapphire Item Level: 80 Implicits: 1 {enchant}+7 to Intelligence 12% increased Chaos Damage Recover 2% of Mana on Kill 6% increased Magnitude of Ailments you inflict Gain 6% of maximum Energy Shield as additional Stun Threshold Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Viper Bloom Emerald Item Level: 66 Implicits: 0 3% increased Attack Speed 10% increased Elemental Damage 14% increased Crossbow Reload Speed 19% increased Magnitude of Shock you inflict Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Megalomaniac Diamond Item Level: 82 Limited to: 1 Implicits: 3 {enchant}Allocates Authority {enchant}Allocates Adverse Growth {enchant}Allocates Instant Reload If you're going to act like you're better than everyone else, make sure you are. Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Temporalis Silk Robe Energy Shield: 205 Item Level: 82 Quality: 20 Sockets: S S Rune: Soul Core of Citaqualotl Rune: Soul Core of Citaqualotl LevelReq: 22 Implicits: 1 {enchant}{rune}+10% to all Elemental Resistances +110 to maximum Energy Shield +15% to all Elemental Resistances 28% of Damage taken Recouped as Life 8% of Damage taken Recouped as Mana Skills have -3.47 seconds to Cooldown

Rarity: UNIQUE Morior Invictus Grand Regalia Armour: 629 Evasion: 573 Energy Shield: 214 Item Level: 84 Quality: 20 Sockets: S S S S S Rune: Soul Core of Citaqualotl Rune: Soul Core of Citaqualotl Rune: Soul Core of Citaqualotl Rune: Soul Core of Citaqualotl Rune: Soul Core of Citaqualotl LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 1 {enchant}{rune}+25% to all Elemental Resistances 288% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield 5% increased Attributes per Socketed Rune or Soul Core 5% increased Maximum Mana per Socketed Rune or Soul Core Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Gale Eye Breach Ring Item Level: 77 LevelReq: 61 Implicits: 1 Maximum Quality is 50% Quality (Mana Modifiers): +50% Adds 1 to 41 Lightning damage to Attacks +200 to Evasion Rating +261 to maximum Mana +31 to Dexterity +15% to all Elemental Resistances +31% to Cold Resistance

Rarity: RARE Corruption Hold Breach Ring Item Level: 76 LevelReq: 55 Implicits: 1 Maximum Quality is 50% Quality (Attribute Modifiers): +50% +231 to Accuracy Rating +163 to maximum Mana 20% increased Rarity of Items found +37 to Dexterity +39 to Intelligence +27% to Fire Resistance

Rarity: UNIQUE Hand of Wisdom and Action Furtive Wraps Evasion: 60 Energy Shield: 23 Item Level: 84 Quality: 20 Sockets: S Rune: Soul Core of Zalatl LevelReq: 52 Implicits: 1 {enchant}{rune}2% increased maximum Mana +16 to Dexterity +22 to Intelligence 3% increased Attack Speed per 25 Dexterity Adds 1 to 12 Lightning Damage to Attacks per 10 Intelligence Corrupted
Rarity: UNIQUE Ingenuity Utility Belt Charm Slots: 0 Item Level: 82 LevelReq: 55 Implicits: 1 20% of Flask Recovery applied Instantly 79% increased bonuses gained from Equipped Rings

Rarity: MAGIC Clinician's Golden Charm of the Continuous Item Level: 80 Quality: 0 LevelReq: 50 Implicits: 1 Used when you Kill a Rare or Unique Enemy Lasts 1.30 Seconds Consumes 80 of 80 Charges on use Currently has 80 Charges 32% increased Duration 35% increased Charges gained

Rarity: MAGIC Compact Ultimate Life Flask of the Sylvan Item Level: 78 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 60 Implicits: 0 Recovers 1371 Life over 3 Seconds Consumes 10 of 75 Charges on use Currently has 75 Charges 49% increased Amount Recovered Gains 0.25 Charges per Second

Rarity: UNIQUE Melting Maelstrom Ultimate Mana Flask Item Level: 81 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 60 Implicits: 0 Recovers 372 Mana over 9.40 Seconds Consumes 10 of 75 Charges on use Currently has 75 Charges Effect is not removed when Unreserved Mana is Filled 213% increased Duration Every 3 seconds during Effect, deal 50% of Mana spent in those seconds as Chaos Damage to Enemies within 3 metres Recover all Mana when Used Deals 25% of current Mana as Chaos Damage to you when Effect ends

Rarity: UNIQUE Kitoko's Current Jewelled Gloves Energy Shield: 37 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 26 Implicits: 0 {range:0.5}(30-50)% increased Energy Shield {range:0.5}+(10-20) to Dexterity {range:0.5}(10-15)% reduced Attack and Cast Speed Lightning damage from Hits Contributes to Electrocution Buildup

Rarity: UNIQUE Atziri's Disdain Gold Circlet Energy Shield: 70 Variant: 0.2.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 2 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 40 Implicits: 0 {variant:1}{range:0.5}+(40-60) to maximum Mana {variant:2}{range:0.5}+(60-100) to maximum Mana {variant:1}{range:0.5}(10-20)% increased Rarity of Items found {variant:2}{range:0.5}(10-15)% increased Rarity of Items found {variant:1}{range:0.5}(20-25)% of Damage taken bypasses Energy Shield {variant:2}10% of Damage taken bypasses Energy Shield {variant:1}{range:0.5}Gain (25-30)% of maximum Life as Extra maximum Energy Shield {variant:2}{range:1}Gain (10-15)% of maximum Life as Extra maximum Energy Shield

Input.name: customMods
Input.string:
#simulate penetrate ascendency
#Simulate lucky lightning 16% more damage
#Crit weakness +10% to Critical Hit Chance
#elemental practitioner 40% increased critical hit chance
+100% elemental resistances
#dynamism /40% increased damage
#shockburst nerf 15% less damage
